# GitHub Topics for Nixxin Repository

## Recommended Topics to Add on GitHub:

### Core Topics:
- nixos
- nix
- configuration
- flake
- home-manager
- nixpkgs
- linux

### Feature Topics:
- modular
- dotfiles
- system-configuration
- desktop-environment
- hyprland
- wayland

### Hardware Topics:
- amd
- intel
- nvidia
- gpu
- hardware

### Usage Topics:
- development
- gaming
- security
- themes
- customization
- setup-script

### Community Topics:
- open-source
- nix-community
- configuration-management
- declarative

## Instructions:
1. Go to your GitHub repository
2. Click "Settings" tab
3. Scroll down to "Topics" section
4. Add these topics (you can add up to 20)
5. Choose the most relevant ones first
